master_row.title: Pressure Scaling Law
master_row.canonical_statement: \begin{theorem}[Universal Criticality] Quantum decoherence cascades, neural avalanches, and TZP information flow exhibit identical scaling: \begin{equation} P(s) \sim s^{-\tau} e^{-s/s_c}, \quad \tau = \frac{3}{2} \end{equation} \end{theorem}
master_row.formation_note: Recovered from a D:\All source document under ‘Critical Exponent Universality’.
master_row.dictionary: Pressure Scaling Law — P(s) ∼ s^-τ e^-s/s_c, τ = (3)/(2)
master_row.encyclopedia: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `00AllEdit\analysis_all_edit_focus_11_22\output\all_edit_equation_arc_compact.csv` for registry alignment and later derivation.
